title: helichrysum trilineatum
intro: Helichrysum trilineatum, also known as the alpine strawflower, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) characterized by its white or pinkish flowers and hairy leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Helichrysum trilineatum include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support wound healing, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and its essential oil is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and alleviate stress.
